clientConfigFields.label: TikTok Permission Scope Checklist
clientConfigFields.defaultValue: In the TikTok app Permission Scope page, select Required: 广告账号管理, 广告管理, 数据报表. Recommended: Onsite Commerce Store.
clientConfigFields.description: A local checklist for the TikTok app Permission Scope page. It is not sent to TikTok during OAuth.

auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: TikTok Business access token sent with the Access-Token header. The token needs advertiser.read, Ad management, Data reports, and GMV Max related permissions for the selected actions.

actions.name: check_gmv_max_shop_ad_usage
actions.description: Check whether a TikTok Shop store is already using custom shop ads and can promote all products with GMV Max.

advertiserId.description: The TikTok advertiser ID that owns the GMV Max resource.

storeId.description: The TikTok Shop store ID used by the GMV Max workflow.

runningCustomShopAds.description: Whether the store is running custom shop ads.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API data object.

outputSchema.description: TikTok GMV Max shop ad usage response.

actions.name: get_gmv_max_bid_recommendation
actions.description: Get TikTok GMV Max budget and bid recommendations before campaign changes.

advertiserId.description: The TikTok advertiser ID that owns the GMV Max resource.

storeId.description: The TikTok Shop store ID used by the GMV Max workflow.

items.description: A TikTok item group ID.

itemGroupIds.description: Optional TikTok item group IDs used to narrow the recommendation.

identityId.description: Optional identity ID used to narrow the recommendation.

inputSchema.description: TikTok GMV Max bid recommendation request.

budget.description: Recommended or reference budget returned by TikTok.

cpaBid.description: Recommended CPA bid returned by TikTok.

roasBid.description: Recommended ROAS bid returned by TikTok.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API data object.

outputSchema.description: TikTok GMV Max bid recommendation response.

customAnchorVideoList.description: Custom anchor video filters forwarded to TikTok.

actions.name: get_gmv_max_exclusive_authorization
actions.description: Get TikTok GMV Max exclusive authorization status for a store.

advertiserId.description: The TikTok advertiser ID that owns the GMV Max resource.

storeId.description: The TikTok Shop store ID used by the GMV Max workflow.

storeAuthorizedBcId.description: The Business Center ID authorized to manage the TikTok Shop store.

inputSchema.description: TikTok GMV Max identity lookup request.

identityId.description: Identity ID holding the exclusive authorization.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

actions.name: get_gmv_max_identities
actions.description: List TikTok identities available for a GMV Max store.

advertiserId.description: The TikTok advertiser ID that owns the GMV Max resource.

storeId.description: The TikTok Shop store ID used by the GMV Max workflow.

storeAuthorizedBcId.description: The Business Center ID authorized to manage the TikTok Shop store.

inputSchema.description: TikTok GMV Max identity lookup request.

storeId.description: TikTok Shop store ID associated with the identity.

identityAuthorizedBcId.description: Business Center ID authorized for the identity.

identityAuthorizedShopId.description: Shop authorization ID for the identity.

liveGmvMaxAvailable.description: Whether the identity is available for live GMV Max.

productGmvMaxAvailable.description: Whether the identity is available for product GMV Max.

runningCustomShopAds.description: Whether the identity is already running custom shop ads.

unavailableReason.description: Reason why the identity is unavailable.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

items.description: A normalized TikTok identity available for GMV Max.

identities.description: GMV Max identities returned by TikTok.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API data object.

actions.name: get_gmv_max_report
actions.description: Get TikTok GMV Max reporting rows for a store and date range.

advertiserId.description: The TikTok advertiser ID that owns the GMV Max resource.

items.description: The TikTok Shop store ID used by the GMV Max workflow.

storeIds.description: The TikTok Shop store IDs to include. TikTok GMV Max supports one store ID per request.

items.description: A TikTok GMV Max report dimension.

dimensions.description: Report dimensions to group by, such as campaign_id.

items.description: A TikTok GMV Max report metric.

metrics.description: Report metrics to return, such as spend or gross_revenue.

startDate.description: Report start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: Report end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

enableTotalMetrics.description: Whether TikTok should include total metric rows.

items.description: A GMV Max campaign ID.

campaignIds.description: Filter report rows to these GMV Max campaign IDs.

campaignName.description: Filter report rows by campaign name.

items.description: TikTok campaign delivery status.

campaignStatuses.description: Filter report rows by TikTok campaign delivery status.

items.description: GMV Max promotion type.

gmvMaxPromotionTypes.description: Filter report rows by GMV Max promotion type.

items.description: A TikTok item group ID.

itemGroupIds.description: Filter report rows to these item group IDs.

items.description: A TikTok item ID.

itemIds.description: Filter report rows to these TikTok item IDs.

items.description: TikTok creative source type.

creativeTypes.description: Filter report rows by creative source type.

items.description: A live room ID.

roomIds.description: Filter report rows to these live room IDs.

searchWord.description: Free-text search term for report filtering.

items.description: A TikTok creative delivery status code.

creativeDeliveryStatuses.description: Filter report rows by creative delivery status code.

filtering.description: Optional filters for the GMV Max report query.

sortField.description: Metric or dimension field used for sorting.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of rows to return per page.

appId.description: TikTok app ID to include in context_info.

coreUserId.description: TikTok core user ID to include in context_info.

developerId.description: TikTok developer ID to include in context_info.

xForwardedFor.description: Original client IP address for x_forwarded_for.

xRealIp.description: Original client IP address for x_real_ip.

contextInfo.description: Optional request context forwarded to TikTok Business API.

items.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

pageInfo.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

totalMetrics.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API data object.

scheduleType.description: TikTok GMV Max session schedule type.

scheduleStartTime.description: Session start time returned by TikTok.

scheduleEndTime.description: Session end time returned by TikTok.

items.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

productList.description: Products attached to this GMV Max session.

itemId.description: TikTok item ID attached to this session.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API payload for this resource.

items.description: A normalized TikTok GMV Max session.

sessions.description: GMV Max sessions returned by TikTok.

requestId.description: TikTok request ID for tracing this API call.

raw.description: The raw TikTok Business API data object.
